title: The Island’s Future Changes
description: On pages 13–16, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8. The central beat is the island’s future changes.
scene: The scene focuses on the island’s future changes, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's a big one over there!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: OHH! Yeah!! That's our lovely captain!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That's the most you're talking to, Captain!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You idiot!! Just spill the beans already!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: It was the straw hat pirates!!!

summary: The Island’s Future Changes. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
